extortion.description: Litchfield Cavo LLP is a premier coverage and litigation defense law firm founded in 1998 on one principal - client service comes first.We are ready to upload more than 300GB  files of essential corporate documents such as: financial data (audit, payment details,financial reports, invoices), employees and customers information (driver's license, Social Security Numbers, death certificate, medical information ) confidential information, NDA  and so on. A lotof personal files and customer data,also you will find a lot of court documents such as police reports, hearings and so on.
